config.rationale: Testing SGLang with NEXTN speculative decoding using the model's built-in MTP layers. This is the 7th experiment, well past the baseline phase. The config enables prefix caching (required for NEXTN), sets max_model_len to 262144 to test the full context length, and uses conservative memory settings (mem_fraction_static=0.85) to avoid OOM. This directly addresses the user's request to evaluate the performance gain from MTP.

smoke_tests.json_mode_detail: No content in response (reasoning model may not support JSON mode)

llm_commentary: The NEXTN speculative decoding experiment achieved 391.6 throughput with 92.6ms TTFT, performing similarly to other SGLang configs but far below the VLLM leader. The speculative decoding did not provide the expected performance boost, suggesting the MTP layers may not be optimally configured or the overhead outweighs benefits.
docker_command: docker run --name bench-sglang-bf5aca9971b6 --gpus all --shm-size 16g --network host -v /root/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface -d -e SGLANG_ENABLE_SPEC_V2=1 lmsysorg/sglang:latest python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --tp-size 1 --dtype auto --enable-metrics --mem-fraction-static 0.9 --context-length 262144 --schedule-policy lpm --mamba-scheduler-strategy extra_buffer --speculative-eagle-topk 1 --speculative-algorithm NEXTN --speculative-num-steps 3 --reasoning-parser qwen3 --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder
